title: Sukai v3
description: One of most downloaded packs on my discord server.
body:
# ☁️ Sukai v3 — fight under a dreamy sky ☁️

**✨ Short Description**  
Sukai is a clean, lightweight PvP resource pack designed for crystal, CPvP, and casual fights. With a soft purple-blue sky 🌅, crisp armor designs, and optimized particles, it gives you high performance ⚡ and a smooth, stylish vibe in every battle.

---

## 💎 Features
- 🌌 Custom pastel sky (purple/blue gradient).  
- 🗡️ Simplified sword & tool textures for clarity in PvP.  
- 🛡️ Unique recolors for diamond & netherite armor.  
- 💨 Optimized particle effects — less clutter, more visibility.  
- ⚡ 16×16 lightweight resolution for maximum FPS.  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` from Modrinth.  
2. ⚙️ Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → “Open Pack Folder”.  
3. 📂 Drop the zip inside (no need to unzip).  
4. 🔄 Enable the pack.

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Minecraft versions: **1.20 - 1.21.3**  
- ✅ Works with most PvP clients ([FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Lunar, Badlion, Feather, etc.).

---
